company.name: Pharmviah
company.tagline: Leading the way in pharmaceutical compliance and safety assessments. Your trusted partner for global regulatory success.

hero.description: We guide pharmaceutical companies through Toxicology Assessments, Regulatory Documentation, Medical QC, MSDS/SDS Authoring, and NABH Accreditation — with Toxicology at the forefront of every solution.

section.title: Comprehensive Regulatory Solutions
section.description: We provide specialized consulting services tailored to the pharmaceutical and healthcare industries.

services.title: Toxicology Assessments
services.shortDescription: Toxicological Risk Assessment (TRA), Permitted Daily Exposure (PDE) calculations, impurity profiling, and safety & regulatory risk evaluation for drug substances.
services.fullDescription: Toxicology assessments are essential for evaluating the safety of pharmaceutical products, impurities, and contaminants. Our expert toxicologists provide comprehensive Toxicological Risk Assessments (TRA), Permitted Daily Exposure (PDE) calculations, impurity profiling, and safety & regulatory risk evaluation to support regulatory submissions and ensure patient safety.

services.title: Regulatory Documentation & Medical Services
services.shortDescription: Document formatting, QC, medical data abstraction, medical writing QC, and SOP writing for pharma and clinical operations.
services.fullDescription: End-to-end regulatory documentation and medical services including document formatting and QC, medical data abstraction and extraction, medical QC and review, and SOP writing. We ensure GCP compliance, accuracy, and audit readiness for pharmaceutical and clinical operations.
features: Literature data tables and meta-analysis data abstraction
Pharma SOPs, Clinical SOPs, and Audit readiness SOPs

services.title: MSDS / SDS Authoring
services.shortDescription: Expert authoring of Material Safety Data Sheets compliant with GHS, REACH, and global regulatory requirements.
services.fullDescription: Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) or Safety Data Sheets (SDS) are critical documents that provide comprehensive information about chemical substances and mixtures. Our expert team ensures compliance with GHS, REACH, and other global regulatory frameworks.

services.title: NABH Accreditation
services.shortDescription: Complete guidance for hospitals and healthcare providers to achieve and maintain National Accreditation Board for Hospitals standards.
services.fullDescription: NABH (National Accreditation Board for Hospitals) accreditation is a comprehensive quality assurance program that ensures healthcare organizations meet the highest standards of patient care, safety, and operational excellence.
benefits: Enhanced patient safety and care quality
Compliance with national and international standards

about.title: Why PharmViah?
about.description: Our mission is to empower healthcare organizations with robust compliance frameworks that ensure patient safety and regulatory success. With over 15 years of industry experience, we bridge the gap between scientific innovation and regulatory requirements.

process.title: Streamlined Path to Compliance
process.description: We've developed a proven 4-step methodology that ensures accuracy, efficiency, and successful outcomes for every project.

image.quote: Excellence is not an act, but a habit.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to elevate your compliance standards? Fill out the form or contact us directly at contact@pharmviah.com.
